schema.backlogRef: string — id from product-backlog.json this originated from
schema.title: string
schema.format: string — Toolkit, Checklist, Executive Guide, Assessment, Course, Workshop, or Subscription
schema.originSignal: string — the recurring signal that justified building this, so the reasoning is never re-derived
schema.revenueOrLeadResult: string — actual measured result since shipping
schema.lastMajorUpdate: string — ISO 8601 date, or null if unchanged since shipping
